acceptance_criteria.title: Real-time inventory accuracy on PDP
given: A product with inventory = 3 at Store #042
then: The page displays '3 available at {storeName}' within p95 ≤ 400ms
The displayed count matches OMS inventory within a ≤ 30s staleness window
If staleness > 30s, a subtle 'refresh' affordance is shown

acceptance_criteria.title: 90-minute reservation hold with immediate decrement
given: A customer selects 'Pick up in store'
then: The item is held for exactly 90 minutes
Inventory count decrements immediately and is visible to other sessions within 2s
Customer receives confirmation email within 60s
On expiry without pickup, inventory auto-releases and customer is notified

acceptance_criteria.title: Graceful degradation when OMS unavailable
given: OMS inventory API returns 5xx or times out > 800ms
then: Product page still renders with full content
Store-inventory module shows 'Check availability in-store' fallback
No error is surfaced to the customer
Circuit breaker opens for 30s; event is logged at WARN level

acceptance_criteria.title: Associate notification on new reservation and arrival
given: A reservation is confirmed for Store #042
then: The on-shift associate cohort at Store #042 receives an in-app notification within 30s
On customer arrival (kiosk scan), a second 'arrived' notification fires within 5s
Notifications respect quiet hours and associate role filters

acceptance_criteria.title: Concurrent reservation on last unit
given: Store #042 has inventory = 1 for SKU X
Customer A and Customer B both attempt to reserve simultaneously
acceptance_criteria.when: Both confirmations are submitted within 2s of each other
then: Exactly one reservation succeeds
The losing customer sees 'Sorry, just sold out — here are 2 nearby stores with availability'
Inventory is atomically decremented; no oversell

acceptance_criteria.title: Loyalty accrual on pickup completion
given: A customer with loyalty account completes pickup of a $50 order at Store #042
then: Loyalty points are credited within 24 hours
Points value matches BR-01 earn rules for the relevant tier
Customer sees points in app next login

acceptance_criteria.title: Kiosk QR pickup flow
given: A customer with an active reservation arrives at Store #042
acceptance_criteria.when: They scan the QR code at the self-service kiosk
then: Kiosk verifies the QR within 2s
Associate App receives 'arrived' signal
Kiosk shows locker/shelf code if applicable, otherwise 'see an associate'
After 3 failed scans, kiosk surfaces a 'see an associate' fallback and flashes a help beacon

acceptance_criteria.title: Accessibility — PDP inventory module screen-reader
given: A customer using VoiceOver or TalkBack
acceptance_criteria.when: They navigate to the PDP inventory module
then: The module is announced with role, state, and live-region updates
Store name, stock count, and staleness (if any) are all readable
Reservation CTA is operable with screen reader; focus order is logical
acceptance_criteria.acceptance_notes: Axe automated + manual VO/TB verification required

acceptance_criteria.title: Performance at peak load
given: Peak traffic at 12,000 RPS sustained on inventory API
acceptance_criteria.when: The load test runs for 60 minutes
then: p95 latency ≤ 400ms
Error rate ≤ 0.1%
No cache stampede observed
Graceful degradation kicks in if threshold breached

acceptance_criteria.title: Reservation expiry edge case
given: A reservation exists and the customer does not arrive
then: Inventory is released atomically
Customer receives 'reservation expired' email with re-reserve link if still in stock
Associate receives 'expired' notification to return item to shelf

acceptance_criteria.title: Refund of BOPIS item before pickup
given: A customer has an active reservation
then: Reservation is released within 10s
Payment authorization is voided (or refunded if captured) per BR-07
Inventory is returned to sellable stock
Associate notification is canceled if not yet actioned

acceptance_criteria.title: Privacy — location signal consent
given: A customer has not granted location permission
acceptance_criteria.when: They reach the PDP with store-preference not set
then: System does NOT request or infer precise location
User is offered a zip-code entry path
No location telemetry is emitted
Consent state is recorded with timestamp and scope per BR-08

acceptance_criteria.title: Partial fulfillment of multi-item order
given: Customer reserves 2 items; one goes OOS between reserve and pick
then: Customer receives 'partial availability' notification with choice: proceed with available item or cancel entire order
Customer choice is honored within 5 min decision window
Non-picked item's reservation releases immediately

acceptance_criteria.title: Observability events emitted
then: Events are emitted for: reservation_created, reservation_confirmed, reservation_expired, pickup_arrived, pickup_completed, pickup_cancelled, degradation_activated
Each event carries correlation_id, store_id, sku, customer_hash, timestamp
Events land in observability pipeline within 60s
No PII appears in event payloads
